financial_metrics.title: Financial Metrics
financial_metrics.label: Excellent
bullets: The bank made a lot of money and grew well, which is why it scored high.
Even though there were some small issues, nothing major went wrong, keeping the score strong.

risk_intelligence.title: Risk Intelligence
risk_intelligence.label: Well Managed
bullets: The bank is handling risks well, but global issues like political tensions and trade policies could still affect its operations.
The bank is saving money by cutting expenses, but there are doubts about whether it can keep costs low in the long run.

esg.title: ESG Analysis
esg.label: Average
bullets: The company is doing well in treating people fairly and managing its leadership.
It needs to improve its efforts to protect the environment.

speaker_sentiment.title: Speaker Sentiment
speaker_sentiment.label: Excellent
bullets: The company's leaders spoke confidently about their strong financial performance and future plans.
They acknowledged some challenges but were optimistic about overcoming them and continuing to grow.

qa_transparency.title: Q&A Transparency
qa_transparency.label: Average
bullets: The company shared some financial numbers but didn't fully explain their business challenges.
They often gave incomplete answers, especially about their future plans and operations.

overall_sentiment.title: Overall Sentiment
overall_sentiment.label: Excellent
bullets: The bank is doing well with more profit and growth, which makes people feel positive about its future.
There are some challenges outside the bank's control, but the leaders are confident they can handle them.

investment_synthesis.title: Investment Synthesis
investment_synthesis.label: Good
bullets: SBI is doing well financially, with profits and loans growing, making it a good choice to buy.
The bank is managing costs effectively and using its digital platform to reach more customers, boosting its performance.
